overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a winding dirt trail through a lush forested area. A horse and rider briefly pass by on the path, moving in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the forested area, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through the grass and trees
dense pine trees lining the left side of the trail
dense pine trees lining the right side of the trail
large gray rock formation visible on the right hillside
sloped terrain covered in tall green grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through a sunlit forest. Tall pine trees line both sides of the path while a rocky outcrop sits on the right hillside. The trail cuts through dense green grass as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: rider on horseback appears in the distance ahead on the trail
horse and rider pass by on the right and exit the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the trail as a horse passes by

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback approaching from ahead on the trail

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a horse and rider appear ahead on the trail, moving in the opposite direction. The rider passes by on the right side and exits the frame. The rocky outcrop recedes into the distance on the right as the character progresses along the forest path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail that transitions from a solitary walk into a brief encounter with another traveler. It begins with the character moving steadily forward through a sunlit forest, flanked by tall pine trees and dense green grass. As the character progresses, the camera tracks past a rocky outcrop on the right hillside that gradually recedes into the distance. The scene then shifts as a horse and rider appear ahead on the path, passing by on the right before exiting the frame. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum, leaving the encounter behind as it follows the trail deeper into the lush woodland.
